prestazioni: Engine: Replace the stock Ford-derived 7.0L (427ci) *W-427* V8 with a fully built *Saleen Racing W-427* block featuring forged Mahle pistons (12.5:1 compression), Carrillo H-beam connecting rods, and a billet crankshaft for 1,000+ HP reliability. Pair with a custom *Weber Motor* dry-sump oiling system and *Titanium Valvetrain Solutions* titanium valves, retainers, and dual valve springs.

Forced Induction: Twin *Garrett GTX5533R* turbochargers (86mm compressor, 106mm turbine) with *Tial MV-R* 60mm wastegates and *TurboSmart* Race Port blow-off valves. Custom *PWR* intercooler core (1,200HP-rated) with billet end tanks and *AEM* 50-1200 universal methanol injection for charge cooling.

Drivetrain: *Holinger* 6-speed sequential transaxle with *PPG* straight-cut gears (1st: 2.90, 2nd: 2.15, 3rd: 1.65, 4th: 1.30, 5th: 1.08, 6th: 0.90) and *Tilton* triple-plate carbon clutch. *Quaife* ATB differential with 4.10 final drive ratio and *Cusco* 2-way adjustable LSD. Custom *GKN* CV joints and *Penske* 8760-series halfshafts.
estetica: Aerodynamics: *RML Group* (ex-F1 aero specialists) custom carbon fiber front splitter with active Gurney flap, *DTM-style* rear diffuser with integrated *Vortex Generators*, and *Le Mans Prototype* (LMP1) inspired rear wing with *DRS* (Drag Reduction System) via *Bosch* actuators. Full *AeroDyn* CFD-optimized underbody tray with *Venturi tunnels*.

Bodywork: *Fiberworks* full carbon fiber body kit (OEM+ replacement) with *3M* Matte Military Green wrap and *Avery Dennison* Gloss Black accents. *HRE* FF16 flow-formed wheels (19x12 front, 20x13 rear) wrapped in *Michelin Pilot Sport Cup 2 R* tires (285/30 R19 front, 345/25 R20 rear). *AP Racing* 6-piston front / 4-piston rear brake calipers with *Brembo* GT-R-spec 400mm carbon-ceramic rotors.

Interior: *Sparco* Pro 2000 carbon fiber seats with *Schroth* 6-point harnesses and *MOMO* 380mm suede steering wheel. *Motec* C187 dash logger with *Racepak* V300SD data acquisition. *Weichers* roll cage (FIA-spec) with *OMP* fire suppression system and *Recaro* HANS-compatible seat mounts. Custom *Bowers & Wilkins* 12-speaker audio system with *DSP* tuning for track use.
